title: Replace QRIS payment image with uploaded image

requirements.summary: Replace the existing QRIS payment image in the OrderForm component with the newly uploaded QRIS image
acceptanceCriteria: The QRIS section in the OrderForm displays the new uploaded QRIS image (showing DIMSUM OJI / NMID: ID1026488874078).
The old QRIS image is no longer shown anywhere in the app.

file_operations.description: Save the generated QRIS payment code image (showing QRIS logo, GPN eagle logo, DIMSUM OJI merchant name, NMID ID1026488874078, label A01, large QR code, and red footer with payment method icons) as a static asset at this workspace path.

Update the QRIS image reference in the OrderForm component to point to the new static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.dim_800x1100.png. Replace the existing src attribute that currently references the old QRIS image (generated/qris-payment-code.dim_300x300.png) with the new path /assets/generated/qris.dim_800x1100.png. Ensure the image displays properly within the QRIS payment section with appropriate responsive styling.
